evals.name: harden-dry-run-then-commit
evals.prompt: Harden the frontend deployment in apptique-prod.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload preflight`, previews `cub-workload harden apptique-prod/frontend` (dry-run), then on confirmation commits with --commit --change-desc. Does not apply to a cluster; does not bypass gates.

evals.name: set-resources-tier
evals.prompt: Give the checkout deployment medium CPU/memory requests and limits.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload set-resources <space>/checkout --tier medium` dry-run then --commit --change-desc. Reports the mutation; no cluster apply.

evals.name: ensure-pdb
evals.prompt: Add a PodDisruptionBudget for the web deployment.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload ensure-pdb <space>/web` dry-run (shows the derived PDB manifest) then --commit --change-desc, creating a new PDB Unit (not applied).

evals.name: routes-bulk-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a fleet-wide change and routes to workload-fleet (`fleet-edit --profile harden-restricted --environment prod`) rather than looping single harden commands.
